hero.subtitle: A personal studio for apps, ideas, and experiments.

about.label: About Moolab
about.heading:
A lab run by
one person.
about.body: Moolab is a small personal studio where curiosity turns into products. From utility apps to side experiments — built slowly, with care.
about.value1Body: Turn ideas into real products. Even small, finished things count.
about.value2Body: Try unvalidated ideas without fear. That's where discoveries happen.
about.value3Body: Shipping beats perfecting. The world teaches you what code never will.
about.ctaBody: Collaboration, feedback, or just a hello — always welcome.

comingSoon.title: Oops! The owner stepped out.
comingSoon.body: Looks like this page is still being built. We'll let you know when it's ready — pinky promise.
